objective: Validate the core::explore::config ExploreConfig model + .grove/explore.json persistence against all seven task acceptance criteria.
key_changes: AC1 PASS: pub mod explore in lib.rs; config.rs exposes ExploreConfig + Provider{Ollama,LlamaCpp} + Mode{Standard,Balanced,Aggressive} with exact field set.
AC2 PASS: config_path=<root>/.grove/explore.json; load/save/validate present; save is atomic (temp .tmp.<pid> then fs::rename).
AC3 PASS: missing file bails to `grove init --as mcp-llm`/`grove config`; bad enum names field + lists legal values via RawExploreConfig manual Deserialize.
AC4 PASS: Default = Ollama http://localhost:11434/v1, model qwen2.5-coder:7b, Standard, allowed_tools=[grove,rg,grep,find].
AC5 PASS: 8 inline tests cover round-trip, defaults, lowercase spellings, missing-file steer, bad-enum, empty-field validation, atomic save/load (no temp leak).
AC6 PASS: cargo tree -p grove-cst shows no clap; no 'fastcontext' string in core/.
AC7 PASS: build warning-clean, clippy -D warnings clean, full test suite green (8/8 explore).
Edge cases covered: missing file, malformed enum, whitespace-only required fields, torn-write mitigation via temp+rename.
Non-blocking nit: AC/PLAN say `cargo tree -p grove-core` but crate package is grove-cst; intent (clap-free core) verified.
Purely additive change; only lib.rs edited among existing files; no regressions.
